high.title: SQL Injection via string concatenation
high.description: User input is directly concatenated into a SQL query without parameterization.
high.code_extract: db.query("SELECT * FROM users WHERE id = " + req.query.id)

high.title: Path traversal — unsanitized file path from user input
high.description: req.query.file is passed directly to fs.readFile without path normalization.

medium.title: Hardcoded database password
medium.description: A password is hardcoded in the source file.
